title: Armenium Community Server
description: Modpack for the infamously cool Armenium closed-community server.
body:
Welcome to Create: Towns and Mystics, a meticulously crafted Minecraft modpack that seamlessly merges the innovative world of Create Addons with the immersive experience of engineering and exploration. Embark on a journey where ingenuity meets mysticism in a Minecraft adventure that challenges your creativity and strategic prowess.

**Key Mods:**

**Create & Addons:** Unleash your creativity with the revolutionary Create mod and enhance your engineering endeavors with a curated selection of powerful addons.

**Farmers Delight:** Cultivate the land, tend to your crops, and experience a revamped farming system that adds depth and realism to your agricultural pursuits.

**Naturalist:** Encounter a diverse array of new creatures and monsters, each with unique behaviors and challenges, adding an extra layer of excitement to your exploration.

**QoL Essentials:** Journey into the unknown equipped with essential quality-of-life mods like Xaero's Map, JEI (Just Enough Items), Natures Compass, and Dynmap, enhancing your overall gaming experience.

**Exploration Unleashed:** Dive into the mysteries of the world with Better Archeology and Regions Unexplored, reshaping the very landscape you traverse with captivating world generation.

**What Sets Us Apart:**
Create: Towns and Mystics is more than just a modpack; it's a gateway to a unique Minecraft experience where engineering marvels coexist with the wonders of exploration. Whether you're an aspiring engineer or a seasoned adventurer, this modpack offers a harmonious blend of creativity, strategy, and mystique.

**Notable Features:**

Build intricate contraptions with Create and Addons.
Immerse yourself in a realistic farming experience with Farmers Delight.
Encounter new wildlife and mythical creatures with Alex's Mobs.
Navigate the world effortlessly with Journey Map and explore diverse biomes with Regions Unexplored.


**Credits:**
_Naturalist - Specail thanks to Starfish_Studios and credits go the mod authors:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naturalist](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naturalist)_

Thanks to sketch_macaw (https://www.curseforge.com/members/sketch_macaw/projects) and check out thier mod page over on CurseForge.

Macaw's Bridges - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-lights-and-lamps

Macaw's Lights and Lamps - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges

We extend our gratitude to the talented modders behind Create, Farmers Delight, Alex's Mobs, and all the other contributors who make this modpack possible.
